name: Official Canton Documentation
desc: The unified new technical docs for Canton Network.

name: Canton Network API Overview
desc: TL;DR overview of all Canton APIs: Ledger API, JSON API, Admin API, Scan API, Validator API, Wallet API. Start here to understand which API you need for what.

name: Canton 101
desc: A community-built overview covering Canton architecture, APIs, SDKs, and core concepts. Good first stop before diving into the official docs.

name: Canton Hub
desc: Canton ecosystem resource hub in four sections - Education, Developers, Validator, Community. Covering docs, guides, tools, articles, videos, recorded recaps and more.

name: DPM: Daml Package Manager
desc: The primary CLI for Canton/Daml development. Scaffolds projects, builds DARs, runs tests, generates TypeScript and Java bindings, manages SDK versions, and runs a local sandbox.

name: Daml Studio (VS Code Extension)
desc: VS Code extension for Daml syntax highlighting, type checking, inline diagnostics, and code navigation. Installed automatically with DPM. Requires VS Code 1.87+.

name: Canton Token Template
desc: A Daml template for building CIP-056 compliant token registries on Canton Network. Clone it, run the setup script, and build your token contract on top.

name: Canton Security 101
desc: A Canton-focused cybersecurity guide covering DAML development, web applications, and operational security. Learn about secure dapp development.

name: Catalyx Package Manager
desc: A community package marketplace for Canton/Daml components. Discover, share, and consume reusable Daml packages across projects.

name: Tokenization Explorer
desc: Visual explorer for Canton tokenization workflows useful for prototyping how tokenised assets flow across Canton participants without building everything from scratch.

name: Canton Foundation MCP
desc: MCP server that plugs accurate Canton docs directly into Claude and other AI tools. Prevents hallucinated or outdated API responses. Refreshes hourly from GitHub.

name: Tenzro DAML Studio
desc: AI-powered browser IDE for generating and editing Daml smart contracts. Includes an agentic layer for DevNet interactions. Review all generated code before deploying.

name: CCPedia
desc: AI-accessible knowledge base over the Canton ecosystem - CIPs, forum, GitHub, Dev Fund proposals, docs, blog, videos and more. Three AI endpoints: MCP server, REST API, llms.txt. Plus web UI for human research.

name: Canton LocalNet (cn-quickstart)
desc: Full Canton Network in Docker Compose with 3 validators, synchronizer, Canton Coin wallets, PQS, Keycloak, and Scan UI. All on your laptop. No DevNet whitelisting needed.

name: Canton Sandbox (via DPM)
desc: Lightweight single-node Canton environment for fast contract iteration. No Docker required. Starts instantly. Use it before moving to the full LocalNet stack.

name: Seaport
desc: Cloud platform for coding, building, deploying, and managing Daml smart contracts, all without local setup. A hosted alternative to the LocalNet toolchain.

name: Daml SDK
desc: The core development kit for building on Canton. Bundles the Daml compiler, Daml Script runner, Canton Sandbox, and supporting tools. Installed and managed through dpm.

name: Wallet SDK
desc: TypeScript library for programmatic wallet operations on Canton i.e party management, token transfers, UTXO queries, transaction signing, and third-party dApp integration.

name: Go SDK for Daml Ledger
desc: Comprehensive Go SDK for Canton/Daml ledgers including Ledger API client, service abstractions, type-safe code generator from .dar files, and a separate Splice Amulet wallet SDK.

name: C7 Ledger & C7 React
desc: Drop-in replacements for @daml/ledger and @daml/react with active maintenance. Same API, works with JS/TS frontends and Node.js backends on Canton.

name: JSON Ledger API
desc: HTTP/JSON interface to the Canton Ledger API. Submit commands, query active contracts, and stream events. All over standard HTTP. Easiest integration path without gRPC.

name: gRPC Ledger API
desc: Full Ledger API over gRPC/Protobuf. Higher performance, required for production backends and streaming event subscriptions. Use dpm codegen for typed client bindings.

name: Scan API
desc: Read-only API for network-level Canton data: mining rounds, Canton Coin supply, featured apps, and DSO governance state. Public read API for the Global Synchronizer.

name: Validator API
desc: REST APIs exposed by each validator node for wallet ops, traffic management, party onboarding, and Canton Coin transfers. What the wallet UIs talk to under the hood.

name: Wallet Gateway (dApp SDK)
desc: Open-source SDK for building dApps that integrate with Canton wallets. Includes the dApp API spec (OpenRPC) and a dApp SDK for connecting your frontend to Canton wallet functionality.

name: HydraX Tokenisation REST APIs
desc: REST APIs for tokenisation utilities on Canton i.e asset issuance, transfer, and custody workflows. Targeted at institutions building tokenised asset infrastructure. Paid service.

name: Noves Canton Data API
desc: Hosted HTTP API for publicly observable Canton data, including update history, balances, prices, transfers, rewards, identity data, ANS records, contract details, and real-time streams. Intended for wallets, analytics dashboards, financial reporting, and event-driven integrations without operating a node or indexer.

name: PQS: Participant Query Store
desc: PostgreSQL-backed query store mirroring your participant's ledger state. Run SQL against contract data. Essential for complex queries, aggregations, reporting, and dashboards.

name: Noves Data App
desc: Self-hosted Canton data indexer and dashboard that connects to a participant's Ledger API, indexes activity into Postgres, and exposes structured data through UI views, exports, alerts, streams, and downstream APIs. Deploys with Docker Compose or Kubernetes and preserves party-level access controls through OIDC/JWT passthrough authorization.

name: CCView Explorer & Indexing API
desc: Canton block explorer with a public indexing API. Browse transactions, ANS lookups, and transaction history. Pull Canton on-chain data into your own application.

name: Lighthouse Explorer
desc: Community-built Canton Network explorer, an alternative view into network activity and transactions.

name: Noves Data Studio
desc: Public explorer for Canton Network activity, including CC price, validators, earnings and rebates, party directories, and featured app compliance metrics. Provides network-level views without requiring users to run an indexer.

name: Find Canton Wallets
desc: Growing ecosystem of wallets: retail, enterprise, self-custody, and custodial for supporting Canton Network assets and Canton Coin.

name: WalletConnect
desc: WalletConnect integration for Canton Network, connect your dApp to any WalletConnect-compatible wallet that supports Canton.

name: Console dApp SDK
desc: npm package for integrating Console Wallet into your Canton dApp. Lets your frontend connect to users' Console Wallet for signing and submitting transactions.

name: Loop SDK
desc: SDK for integrating the Loop Wallet into your Canton dApp frontend. Connects users' Loop Wallet for Canton Coin and asset management.

name: Five North ID SDK
desc: Identity verification SDK for Canton applications. Integrates tamper-proof KYC/identity checks, relevant for regulated industries where user identity verification is a requirement.

name: AI Agentic Wallet
desc: Enables AI agents to Create&Manage a Canton wallet and Request initial testnet funding via faucet amd continue using the same wallet for subsequent interactions

name: x402 MCP
desc: Enables AI agents to Consume and pay for apps/services that integrated x402, Create wallet and interact with it and Request one-time faucet funding

name: x402 Facilitator for Canton
desc: The x402 facilitator service for Canton. Exposes /verify, /settle and /supported for the 'exact' scheme, relays payer-signed TransferFactory_Transfer transactions, and sponsors the Global Synchronizer traffic fee, so payments settle in a single gasless transaction. Live at facilitator.ftptech.xyz.

name: x402 Merchant Middleware for Canton
desc: x402 merchant middleware for Canton: Express and Next.js. Gate any route behind a Canton Coin charge; the middleware issues the 402 PaymentRequirements and delegates verify/settle to a facilitator. Publishes as @ftptech/x402-canton-express and @ftptech/x402-canton-next.

name: x402 Agent SDK for Canton
desc: x402 client/agent SDK for Canton with a self-custody wallet. AI agents create and manage a Canton wallet (with one-time faucet funding), then auto-pay 402 challenges by signing a TransferFactory_Transfer and retrying, no API keys or accounts. Publishes as @ftptech/x402-canton-client with the canton-agent-wallet CLI.

name: x402 Core for Canton
desc: Shared wire types and the 'exact' payment scheme foundation for x402 on Canton, used by the agent SDK, merchant middleware and facilitator. Publishes as @ftptech/x402-canton-core.

name: CGGMP24
desc: Rust implementation of the CGGMP24 threshold ECDSA protocol, the signature scheme used by Canton Network. Supports distributed key generation and threshold signing with presignatures for t-of-n keys for wallet infrastructure and validator key custody.

name: Givre
desc: Rust implementation of threshold Schnorr / EdDSA signing, the signature scheme used by Canton Network. Supports distributed key generation and threshold signing with presignatures for t-of-n keys for wallet infrastructure and validator key custody.

name: CC Space
desc: Canton Network Explorer with activity, analytics, indexed-data API, configurable alerts and validator monitoring – all in one place.
